bead.title: install/update: --global flag installs/updates machine-wide tree; project installs honor in-tree vs convention mode
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a)
`ddx install` and `ddx update` must support a `--global` surface that writes/updates the machine-wide plugin tree (${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>) with agent-tier skill links under ~/.claude/skills/<name> and ~/.agents/skills/<name>, while the no-flag form installs/updates the project tree — correctly distinguishing in-tree (<project>/.ddx/) from convention (${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<identity>/) mode — with project-tier links under <project>/.claude/skills/<name> and <project>/.agents/skills/<name>.

ROOT CAUSE
- cmd/install.go:184 `resolveInstallDirs(global)` chooses installRoot=ddxroot.GlobalDir() (install.go:186) for global, else ddxroot.Path() (install.go:195) which absorbs the in-tree/convention distinction.
- cmd/install.go:202 `selectInstallState(global)` switches between global and project state files.
- cmd/install.go:434 `installLocal(...)` and install.go:519-570 decide plugin dir + skill link targets for global vs project.
- cmd/update.go:65 `performGlobalUpdate(opts)` updates only the machine-wide tree when opts.Global (update.go:35) is set; the no-flag path must update the active project tree in whichever mode is active.

PROPOSED FIX
1. Confirm `ddx install <name> --global` writes to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name> and creates ~/.claude/skills/<name> and ~/.agents/skills/<name> links/copies.
2. Confirm `ddx install <name>` (in-tree) writes to <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name> and links <project>/.claude/skills/<name> and <project>/.agents/skills/<name>.
3. Confirm `ddx install <name>` (convention) writes to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<identity>/plugins/<name> and links the project-tier skill paths into that XDG plugins path.
4. Confirm `ddx update --global` mutates only the global tree, and `ddx update` (no flag) mutates only the active project tree in the active mode.
5. Cover each behavior with named tests against temp HOME/XDG + fixture project; use the resolver from sibling ddx-602ae31a-child-A for any lookup assertions.

NON-SCOPE
- Removing the per-project install tier (both tiers coexist).
- Migrating ~/.config/ddx/ legacy paths.
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.
- Runtime lookup precedence internals (sibling child) and init/doctor wiring (sibling children).

DEPS
ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution) — install/update route through ddxroot.Path() and ddxroot.GlobalDir(); both must be agreed-on before this lands.

GOVERNING ARTIFACTS
- docs/helix/02-design/adr/ADR-027-skill-install-topology.md.
- library/skills/ddx/SKILL.md "How this skill works" (install locations).
bead.acceptance:
1. TestInstallGlobal_WritesGlobalTreeAndAgentLinks (cmd/install_global_test.go) asserts `ddx install <name> --global --silent` creates ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>/ and a symlink-or-copy at ~/.claude/skills/<name> and ~/.agents/skills/<name>.
2. TestInstall_InTreeMode_WritesProjectTreeAndLinks (cmd/install_test.go) asserts `ddx install <name>` with <project>/.ddx/ present writes <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name>/ and links <project>/.claude/skills/<name> and <project>/.agents/skills/<name>.
3. TestInstall_ConventionMode_WritesXdgProjectTreeAndLinks (cmd/install_test.go) asserts `ddx install <name>` with no <project>/.ddx/ writes ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/projects/<identity>/plugins/<name>/ and links the project-tier skill paths into that XDG plugins path.
4. TestUpdateGlobal_UpdatesGlobalNotProject (cmd/update_test.go) asserts `ddx update --global` mutates only the global plugin tree and leaves the project tree untouched.
5. TestUpdate_RespectsConventionVsInTreeMode (cmd/update_test.go) asserts `ddx update` (no flag) updates the project install in whichever mode is active and does not touch the global tree.
6. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
7. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
